title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 346.080 - Temporary permit renewed, when — temporary license issued, when — bond required for temporary licensee
text:
346.080.  Temporary permit renewed, when — temporary license issued, when — bond required for temporary licensee. — If a hearing instrument specialist in-training under this section or section 346.075 has not successfully passed the licensing examination within one year from the date of issuance of the temporary permit, the temporary permit may be renewed by the board once for a period of six months upon payment by the applicant of a fee, as defined by board rule.
(L. 1973 H.B. 396 & 257 § 16, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 1995 S.B. 69, et al., A.L. 2009 S.B. 296)
